title: Minimum Essential Standards, Assessment and Rating for Undergraduate Ayurveda Colleges and Attached Teaching Hospitals Regulations, 2024
notes: Threshold values for the 100-seat intake come from MESAR (UG) Ayurveda 2024 checks already encoded in the legacy demo. Values for other intakes seed from the legacy demo's non-100 branch pending dual-entry re-keying of the MESAR schedules (handoff gap HG-04).
